sellers_note: NO HAGGLE PRICING. THE PRICE YOU SEE IS THE PRICE YOU PAY. All advertised prices reflect the price available to all customers and do not include applicable government fees such as sales tax, title, registration, or other required state charges. No additional dealer, processing, or reconditioning fees are added beyond the advertised price. Optional products and services, including service contracts, GAP coverage, and aftermarket accessories, are not included in the advertised price and are completely optional. These items will be added only after receiving your approval or confirmation to opt in. All vehicles are sold cosmetically as-is unless otherwise stated in writing. Financing is available through a network of third-party lenders and is subject to credit approval and lender terms. Not all customers will qualify for all programs. Any advertised financing offers will be clearly disclosed and available to qualified buyers. We do our best to ensure all vehicle information is accurate, but details such as pricing, availability, features, and specifications may change at any time without notice. Please confirm all information with a member of our team. Vehicles may sell before listing updates. Any advertised discounts or special programs are available to qualified customers and may require verification. Each vehicle is unique and offered based on its individual features, mileage, and condition. By submitting your information, you agree to be contacted by Power Motors East via phone, email, or text regarding your inquiry. Message and data rates may apply. You can opt out of text messages at any time by replying STOP. At Power Motors East, we don't just sell cars—we build lasting relationships. Every vehicle is carefully selected for quality and value, every customer is treated with honesty and respect, and every purchase is backed by a commitment to making your car-buying experience simple, transparent, and enjoyable.
